notes: Repo-level evals (dev/CI only; not shipped in the plugin). Each case runs the skill headlessly (no live human: gaps become honest dispositions) and is graded by assertions.py (structural) + rubric.md (qualitative, vs the golden).

evals.name: file-grounded-queue-voting
evals.prompt: Run the hsb-teamwork intake-brainstorm skill in non-interactive mode. Source file: evals/intake-brainstorm/fixtures/sources/00-submitter-brief-queue-voting.md. Extract everything the file supports; for any genuine gap, make a reasonable assumption and mark it with an honest disposition rather than asking. Write the filled target document to {OUT}/target-document.md (keep the section annotations and the END OF DOCUMENT sentinel). Do not ask questions.
evals.expected_output: A filled intake record: all four blocking capture sections (problem/originator/reach/impact) resolved at or above threshold, a flagged triage DRAFT, confidence lines preserved, sentinel present.

evals.name: fresh-one-liner
evals.prompt: Run the hsb-teamwork intake-brainstorm skill in non-interactive mode on this one-line demand: 'Enterprise admins can't manage their own user seats; every change is a support ticket with 1-3 day turnaround.' No files. For gaps, make reasonable assumptions and mark them as assumptions/discovery rather than asking. Write the target document to {OUT}/target-document.md. Do not ask questions.
evals.expected_output: Blocking sections either filled or honestly disposed (assumption/discovery); problem framed as pain not solution; triage flagged as draft; sentinel present.

evals.name: revisit-underfilled
evals.prompt: Run the hsb-teamwork intake-brainstorm skill in REVISIT mode on the existing document at {OUT}/seed.md (copied in by the runner). Re-score each section, fill or honestly dispose the weak/empty ones non-interactively, bump the revision, and write the result to {OUT}/target-document.md.
evals.expected_output: Previously empty blocking sections become resolved or honestly disposed; revision bumped; sentinel present.

evals.name: batch-headless
evals.prompt: Run the hsb-teamwork intake-brainstorm skill in BATCH/headless mode (no human) on source evals/intake-brainstorm/fixtures/sources/00-submitter-brief-access-control.md. Extract from the file; every truly-unknown blocking field becomes an honest assumption/discovery disposition (this is draft-for-review, never gateReady on its own). Write the target document to {OUT}/target-document.md.
evals.expected_output: A draft-for-review intake: blocking sections resolved or disposed, dispositions explicit, triage flagged draft, sentinel present.
